---
title: "test_web_enrichment.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\sentinel\test_web_enrichment.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.65
style_score: 4.33
intel_score: 3.98
overall_score: 4.34
---

## Intent
The `test_web_enrichment.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_scan_and_enrich_imports_valid_code, test_scan_and_enrich_imports_invalid_import, test_quota_exhausted. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_scan_and_enrich_imports_valid_code, test_scan_and_enrich_imports_invalid_import, test_quota_exhausted. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `test_scan_and_enrich_imports_valid_code`
- `test_scan_and_enrich_imports_invalid_import`
- `test_quota_exhausted`
